mapper.sql: id, user_id, plan_id, phase_index, problem_slug, status, created_at, updated_at

session_row.id, session_row.user_id, session_row.plan_id, session_row.phase_index, session_row.problem_slug, session_row.status, session_row.agent_task_id, session_row.problem_statement_message_id, progress.status AS progress_status, session_row.last_message_at, session_row.created_at, session_row.updated_at, session_row.locale
mapper.select: INSERT INTO learning_plan_problem_progress ( user_id, plan_id, phase_index, problem_slug, status, started_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{planId}, #{phaseIndex}, #{problemSlug}, 'IN_PROGRESS', NOW(), NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, plan_id, phase_index, problem_slug) DO UPDATE SET status = CASE WHEN learning_plan_problem_progress.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN learning_plan_problem_progress.status ELSE 'IN_PROGRESS' END, started_at = COALESCE(learning_plan_problem_progress.started_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() RETURNING

WITH upserted AS ( INSERT INTO practice_session ( user_id, plan_id, phase_index, problem_slug, status, locale, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{planId}, #{phaseIndex}, #{problemSlug}, 'ACTIVE', #{locale}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, plan_id, phase_index, problem_slug) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = practice_session.updated_at RETURNING * ) SELECT
FROM practice_session session_row JOIN upserted ON upserted.id = session_row.id JOIN learning_plan_problem_progress progress ON progress.user_id = session_row.user_id AND progress.plan_id = session_row.plan_id AND progress.phase_index = session_row.phase_index AND progress.problem_slug = session_row.problem_slug FOR UPDATE OF session_row

SELECT
FROM practice_session session_row JOIN learning_plan_problem_progress progress ON progress.user_id = session_row.user_id AND progress.plan_id = session_row.plan_id AND progress.phase_index = session_row.phase_index AND progress.problem_slug = session_row.problem_slug WHERE session_row.id = #{sessionId} AND session_row.user_id = #{userId}

WITH session_row AS ( UPDATE practice_session SET agent_task_id = #{agentTaskId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{sessionId} RETURNING * ) SELECT
FROM session_row JOIN learning_plan_problem_progress progress ON progress.user_id = session_row.user_id AND progress.plan_id = session_row.plan_id AND progress.phase_index = session_row.phase_index AND progress.problem_slug = session_row.problem_slug

WITH session_row AS ( UPDATE practice_session SET problem_statement_message_id = #{messageId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{sessionId} RETURNING * ) SELECT
FROM session_row JOIN learning_plan_problem_progress progress ON progress.user_id = session_row.user_id AND progress.plan_id = session_row.plan_id AND progress.phase_index = session_row.phase_index AND progress.problem_slug = session_row.problem_slug

UPDATE learning_plan_problem_progress progress SET status = #{status}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(progress.completed_at, NOW()) ELSE progress.completed_at END, skipped_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SKIPPED' THEN COALESCE(progress.skipped_at, NOW()) ELSE progress.skipped_at END, updated_at = NOW() FROM practice_session session_row WHERE session_row.id = #{sessionId} AND session_row.user_id = #{userId} AND progress.user_id = session_row.user_id AND progress.plan_id = session_row.plan_id AND progress.phase_index = session_row.phase_index AND progress.problem_slug = session_row.problem_slug RETURNING progress.id, progress.user_id, progress.plan_id, progress.phase_index, progress.problem_slug, progress.status, progress.created_at, progress.updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE practice_session SET last_message_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{sessionId}
